title: centrosema brachypodum
intro: Centrosema brachypodum, also known as the small butterfly pea or small cowpea, is a perennial legume native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Centrosema brachypodum include its potential to help manage conditions such as diabetes, hypertension, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tonics, often in combination with other herbs, to harness its medicinal properties.
